You are acting as a senior production engineer and staff-level full-stack architect working inside an existing repository.

## Core operating rules
- First inspect the current repository structure before making changes.
- Preserve and extend the existing architecture unless it is clearly incorrect or blocks requirements.
- Prefer updating existing files over creating redundant alternatives.
- Keep the codebase clean, modular, and production-grade.
- Do not generate pseudo-code.
- Do not leave TODOs or placeholders for core requirements.
- Do not weaken or simplify explicit requirements from the task prompt.
- Do not replace required workflows with mocks, fake logic, or static hardcoded responses.
- Keep controllers thin and move business logic into services.
- Use clear naming and semantic directory structure.
- Validate all API inputs (body/query/path) and return clean JSON errors.
- Use structured logging for important business events.
- Preserve one-command startup: `docker compose up`
- Do not require manual environment file creation or manual DB setup.
- Use only public dependencies and public base images.
- Do not rely on the host machine or global tools.
- After implementation, always summarize:
  1. files created/updated
  2. what is now working
  3. any remaining risks or assumptions

I need you to plan and then help implement a complete production-grade full-stack application. In this step, do NOT generate the full code yet. First produce a concrete implementation blueprint and execution plan that we will follow.

# Project Task Prompt
A HarborOps Lodging & Supply Management System that includes end-to-end operations for a property company running multiple locations with on-site inventory and guest/host trust controls. On the Vue.js web interface, users sign in with a local username and password and land on role-based workspaces: Inventory Clerks manage receiving, issue, transfer, and stock counts across locations (for example, “Downtown Warehouse” and “Bayfront Property”), scanning barcodes and selecting lots to keep linens, amenities, and maintenance parts traceable. The UI highlights low-stock alerts when on-hand drops below a configurable safety threshold (default 10 units or 7 days of average usage, whichever is higher) and guides procurement receiving with vendor selection and a receiving record that captures unit cost in USD, pack size, and delivery date/time. Managers use a visual query center to filter inventory ledger activity by date range, location, item, vendor, and lot, customize visible columns, paginate through large datasets with responsive feedback, and export results to Excel/CSV for offline accounting. Front-desk and Host users handle post-stay reviews: guests submit a 1–5 rating across cleanliness, communication, and accuracy, add text and up to 6 images (5 MB each), optionally post a follow-up review within 7 days, and apply predefined tags; hosts can reply once within 14 days. A two-way rating and trust system also supports post-task reviews for service interactions, with clear on-screen credit impact explanations and an appeal path. For merchandising, staff configure a pricing and promotion engine with effective dates, mutual exclusions, and priority rules so checkout always shows the best offer and an itemized discount breakdown. Product search supports full-text keyword queries with category and attribute filters, sorting, suggested terms, and trending keywords visible to managers for merchandising decisions.

The backend uses Express (TypeScript) to expose offline RESTful APIs consumed by the decoupled Vue.js frontend, with MySQL as the local system of record for inventory movements, lots, vendors, reviews, moderation actions, promotions, and credit histories. Inventory workflows validate that transfers cannot create negative stock, stock counts require manager approval when variance exceeds 5% or $250.00, and lot-controlled items must always record lot and expiration when applicable; every movement writes an immutable ledger entry to support traceability and aging/turnover calculations. Reviews and trust records enforce governance: sensitive-word filtering uses a locally maintained dictionary, anti-spam rate limits default to 3 reviews per user per hour, reported content is queued for Moderator triage, and appeals move through statuses with arbitration notes and final outcomes stored for audit. The promotion engine resolves conflicts deterministically by evaluating highest priority first, then choosing the maximum savings when priorities tie, while preserving a traceable “why this discount applied” history. Search and reporting performance is supported by MySQL full-text indexes and local caching with time-based invalidation (default 15 minutes) and nightly aggregation jobs for KPI dashboards (DAU, conversion, AOV, repurchase, refund rate) and review-efficiency/risk reports; scheduled report delivery is implemented as in-app downloads prepared at a chosen time (no email/SMS). Security is fully offline: passwords are hashed with per-user salts, sensitive fields like phone numbers are masked in UI and encrypted at rest, exports are watermarked with the requesting username and timestamp, and role-based access controls prevent non-admin users from viewing vendor costs, credit-rule configuration, or moderation audit trails.

# Non-negotiable delivery requirements
1. Start command: must run with exactly `docker compose up`
2. Running dependencies must be declared in docker-compose
3. Zero private dependencies / no host reliance / no manual setup
4. Explicitly expose ports in docker-compose.yml
5. README.md must include:
   - Start Command (How to Run)
   - Service Address (Services List)
   - Verification method
6. Must be a complete engineering project, not snippets
7. Must include:
   - `unit_tests/`
   - `API_tests/`
   - root `run_tests.sh`
8. Must implement real business logic, not mocks
9. Must follow the task prompt strictly; no unauthorized simplification

# Required stack
Use this stack unless a requirement absolutely forces otherwise:
- Frontend: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Pinia + Vue Router + Tailwind CSS + Naive UI (or equivalent premium Vue UI)
- Backend: Express + TypeScript + Prisma + MySQL 8
- Validation: Zod
- Auth: bcrypt hashed passwords
- Logging: pino or winston
- Testing: Vitest/Jest + Supertest
- File uploads: local storage in Docker volume
- Exports: CSV + Excel
- Scheduling: node-cron
- Caching: local in-memory TTL cache

# What I want in THIS STEP ONLY
Produce a practical implementation blueprint with these sections:

1. Chosen architecture
   - frontend architecture
   - backend layered architecture

   - shared conventions
   - Docker topology

2. Domain decomposition

8. Implementation order

9. Top 10 acceptance risks
   - what could fail acceptance and how to avoid it

# Important behavior
- Be strict and exhaustive
- Do not simplify difficult requirements
- If ambiguous, choose the most production-sensible interpretation
- Optimize for a real deliverable that can pass acceptance

Empty repo, fresh start. Here is the full implementation blueprint.

---

# HarborOps Lodging & Supply Management System — Implementation Blueprint

---

## 1. Chosen Architecture

### Docker Topology

```
docker-compose.yml
├── mysql       (MySQL 8, port 3306, volume for data persistence)
├── backend     (Express/TS, port 3000, depends_on mysql, volume for uploads)
└── frontend    (Vue 3/Vite dev server, port 5173, depends_on backend)
```

All three services in one compose file. MySQL uses a healthcheck (`mysqladmin ping`) so backend waits. Backend runs Prisma migrations on startup via an entrypoint script. Frontend proxies `/api` to backend.

### Backend Layered Architecture

```
backend/
├── prisma/
│   ├── schema.prisma
│   ├── seed.ts                  # default roles, locations, sensitive-word dict, demo data
│   └── migrations/
├── src/
│   ├── index.ts                 # Express bootstrap, middleware registration
│   ├── config/                  # env vars, constants (thresholds, TTLs, limits)
│   ├── middleware/
│   │   ├── auth.ts              # JWT verify + role gate
│   │   ├── rateLimiter.ts       # per-user rate limit (reviews: 3/hr)
│   │   ├── upload.ts            # multer config (6 files, 5 MB each)
│   │   ├── errorHandler.ts      # global JSON error envelope
│   │   └── requestLogger.ts     # pino structured logging
│   ├── modules/                 # domain modules, each self-contained
│   │   ├── auth/
│   │   │   ├── auth.routes.ts
│   │   │   ├── auth.controller.ts
│   │   │   ├── auth.service.ts
│   │   │   └── auth.schema.ts   # Zod schemas
│   │   ├── inventory/
│   │   │   ├── inventory.routes.ts
│   │   │   ├── inventory.controller.ts
│   │   │   ├── inventory.service.ts
│   │   │   ├── inventory.schema.ts
│   │   │   └── inventory.helpers.ts  # low-stock calc, variance checks
│   │   ├── reviews/
│   │   ├── trust/
│   │   ├── promotions/
│   │   ├── search/
│   │   ├── reports/
│   │   ├── moderation/
│   │   └── users/
│   ├── lib/
│   │   ├── cache.ts             # in-memory TTL cache (Map + setTimeout)
│   │   ├── scheduler.ts         # node-cron jobs (nightly aggregation, report prep)
│   │   ├── exporter.ts          # CSV (csv-stringify) + Excel (exceljs) with watermark
│   │   ├── encryption.ts        # AES-256-GCM for sensitive fields at rest
│   │   ├── contentFilter.ts     # sensitive-word dictionary filter
│   │   └── prisma.ts            # singleton Prisma client
│   └── types/                   # shared TS types / enums
├── Dockerfile
├── entrypoint.sh                # npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma db seed && node dist/index.js
├── tsconfig.json
└── package.json
```

### Frontend Architecture

```
frontend/
├── src/
│   ├── main.ts
│   ├── App.vue
│   ├── router/
│   │   └── index.ts             # route guards by role
│   ├── stores/                  # Pinia stores
│   │   ├── auth.ts
│   │   ├── inventory.ts
│   │   ├── reviews.ts
│   │   ├── promotions.ts
│   │   ├── search.ts
│   │   └── reports.ts
│   ├── composables/             # reusable logic (useExport, usePagination, useDebounce)
│   ├── api/                     # Axios instances + typed endpoint wrappers per domain
│   ├── views/                   # page-level components (one per route)
│   │   ├── Login.vue
│   │   ├── Dashboard.vue
│   │   ├── inventory/
│   │   ├── reviews/
│   │   ├── promotions/
│   │   ├── search/
│   │   ├── reports/
│   │   ├── moderation/
│   │   └── admin/
│   ├── components/              # shared UI atoms/molecules
│   └── assets/
├── Dockerfile                   # multi-stage: build → nginx (or Vite dev for compose)
├── vite.config.ts
├── tailwind.config.js
├── tsconfig.json
└── package.json
```

### Shared Conventions

- **API envelope**: `{ success: boolean, data?: T, error?: { code: string, message: string } }`
- **Auth**: JWT in `Authorization: Bearer <token>`, 24h expiry, role claim embedded
- **Pagination**: `?page=1&pageSize=20` → response includes `{ items, total, page, pageSize }`
- **Dates**: ISO 8601 strings over the wire, UTC in DB
- **IDs**: auto-increment integers (MySQL)
- **Naming**: camelCase in TS/Vue, snake_case in DB columns (Prisma `@@map`)

---

## 2. Domain Decomposition

| # | Module | Scope |
|---|--------|-------|
| 1 | **Auth & Users** | Registration, login, password hashing (bcrypt + per-user salt), JWT issuance, role management (Admin, Manager, InventoryClerk, FrontDesk, Host, Guest, Moderator) |
| 2 | **Locations** | CRUD for locations (Downtown Warehouse, Bayfront Property, etc.) |
| 3 | **Inventory Core** | Items, categories, lots, vendors, stock levels per location |
| 4 | **Inventory Movements** | Receiving, issue, transfer, stock count — immutable ledger entries |
| 5 | **Low-Stock Alerts** | On-hand vs safety threshold (max of 10 units, 7-day avg usage) |
| 6 | **Procurement Receiving** | Vendor selection, unit cost USD, pack size, delivery datetime |
| 7 | **Inventory Query Center** | Filterable ledger view, column customization, pagination, Excel/CSV export with watermark |
| 8 | **Reviews (Guest)** | 1–5 rating (cleanliness, communication, accuracy), text, up to 6 images, follow-up within 7 days, predefined tags |
| 9 | **Reviews (Host Reply)** | Single reply within 14 days |
| 10 | **Trust & Credit** | Two-way post-task ratings, credit impact explanations, appeal path |
| 11 | **Moderation** | Sensitive-word filter, anti-spam rate limit (3/hr), report queue, moderator triage, appeal statuses, arbitration notes, audit trail |
| 12 | **Promotions** | Pricing rules with effective dates, mutual exclusions, priority, deterministic conflict resolution, discount breakdown, "why this discount" history |
| 13 | **Product Search** | Full-text keyword search, category/attribute filters, sorting, suggested terms, trending keywords (manager view) |
| 14 | **Reports & KPIs** | Nightly aggregation (DAU, conversion, AOV, repurchase, refund rate), review-efficiency/risk reports, scheduled in-app download |
| 15 | **Security** | Field encryption at rest (phone numbers), export watermarking, RBAC enforcement, cost/credit/audit visibility gates |

---

## 3. Database Design

### Tables (35 tables)

```
-- AUTH & USERS
users (id, username, password_hash, salt, role, phone_encrypted, phone_masked, created_at, updated_at)
roles_enum: Admin | Manager | InventoryClerk | FrontDesk | Host | Guest | Moderator

-- LOCATIONS
locations (id, name, address, created_at)

-- INVENTORY
items (id, name, sku, category, description, is_lot_controlled, unit_of_measure, created_at)
  → FULLTEXT INDEX on (name, description, sku)
vendors (id, name, contact_info_encrypted, created_at)
lots (id, item_id FK, lot_number, expiration_date, created_at)
stock_levels (id, item_id FK, location_id FK, lot_id FK nullable, on_hand, safety_threshold, avg_daily_usage, updated_at)
  → UNIQUE(item_id, location_id, lot_id)

-- INVENTORY LEDGER (immutable)
inventory_ledger (id, item_id FK, lot_id FK nullable, from_location_id FK nullable, to_location_id FK nullable, movement_type ENUM(RECEIVING,ISSUE,TRANSFER,STOCK_COUNT,ADJUSTMENT), quantity, unit_cost_usd nullable, vendor_id FK nullable, pack_size nullable, delivery_datetime nullable, reference_number, performed_by FK, approved_by FK nullable, notes, created_at)
  → INDEX on (item_id, created_at)
  → INDEX on (location – via from/to, movement_type, created_at)
  → INDEX on (vendor_id, created_at)
  → INDEX on (lot_id)

-- STOCK COUNTS
stock_counts (id, location_id FK, initiated_by FK, status ENUM(DRAFT,PENDING_APPROVAL,APPROVED,REJECTED), variance_pct, variance_usd, approved_by FK nullable, created_at, completed_at)
stock_count_lines (id, stock_count_id FK, item_id FK, lot_id FK nullable, system_qty, counted_qty, variance_qty, variance_pct, variance_usd)

-- REVIEWS
reviews (id, reviewer_id FK, reviewee_id FK nullable, target_type ENUM(STAY,TASK), target_id, rating_cleanliness TINYINT, rating_communication TINYINT, rating_accuracy TINYINT, overall_rating DECIMAL(2,1), text, is_follow_up BOOLEAN, parent_review_id FK nullable, status ENUM(ACTIVE,FLAGGED,HIDDEN,REMOVED), created_at)
  → FULLTEXT INDEX on (text)
  → CHECK: ratings 1-5
review_images (id, review_id FK, file_path, file_size, uploaded_at)
review_tags (id, review_id FK, tag_id FK)
tags (id, name, category)
host_replies (id, review_id FK, host_id FK, text, created_at)
  → UNIQUE(review_id) — one reply per review

-- TRUST & CREDIT
trust_scores (id, user_id FK, score DECIMAL(5,2), last_updated)
credit_history (id, user_id FK, change_amount DECIMAL(5,2), reason, source_type ENUM(REVIEW,TASK,MODERATION,APPEAL), source_id, explanation, created_at)
  → INDEX on (user_id, created_at)

-- MODERATION
reports (id, reporter_id FK, content_type ENUM(REVIEW,REPLY), content_id, reason, status ENUM(PENDING,IN_REVIEW,RESOLVED,DISMISSED), assigned_to FK nullable, created_at, resolved_at)
moderation_actions (id, report_id FK, moderator_id FK, action ENUM(WARN,HIDE,REMOVE,RESTORE), notes, created_at)
appeals (id, user_id FK, moderation_action_id FK, status ENUM(PENDING,IN_REVIEW,UPHELD,OVERTURNED), user_statement, arbitration_notes, outcome, created_at, resolved_at)
sensitive_words (id, word, category, created_at)

-- PROMOTIONS
promotions (id, name, description, discount_type ENUM(PERCENTAGE,FIXED_AMOUNT), discount_value DECIMAL(10,2), effective_start DATETIME, effective_end DATETIME, priority INT, is_active BOOLEAN, conditions JSON, created_at)
  → INDEX on (is_active, priority, effective_start, effective_end)
promotion_exclusions (id, promotion_id FK, excluded_promotion_id FK)
  → UNIQUE(promotion_id, excluded_promotion_id)
promotion_items (id, promotion_id FK, item_id FK)
applied_promotions (id, item_id FK, promotion_id FK, original_price DECIMAL(10,2), discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2), final_price DECIMAL(10,2), reason_applied TEXT, applied_at)

-- PRODUCTS / SEARCH
product_attributes (id, item_id FK, attribute_name, attribute_value)
  → INDEX on (attribute_name, attribute_value)
search_logs (id, user_id FK nullable, query_text, results_count, created_at)
  → INDEX on (created_at)
  → FULLTEXT INDEX on (query_text)
suggested_terms (id, term, frequency, is_trending BOOLEAN, updated_at)

-- REPORTS & KPIs
kpi_daily (id, date DATE UNIQUE, dau INT, conversion_rate DECIMAL(5,2), aov DECIMAL(10,2), repurchase_rate DECIMAL(5,2), refund_rate DECIMAL(5,2))
report_review_efficiency (id, date DATE, avg_moderation_time_hrs DECIMAL(5,2), flagged_count INT, resolved_count INT, appeal_rate DECIMAL(5,2))
scheduled_reports (id, report_type, requested_by FK, scheduled_time DATETIME, status ENUM(PENDING,GENERATING,READY,FAILED), file_path nullable, created_at, completed_at)

-- RATE LIMITING
rate_limit_log (id, user_id FK, action VARCHAR, created_at)
  → INDEX on (user_id, action, created_at)
```

---

## 4. API Surface

### Auth (`/api/auth`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/register` | Create user account |
| POST | `/login` | Login → JWT |
| GET | `/me` | Current user profile |

### Users (`/api/users`) — Admin only
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List users (paginated) |
| PATCH | `/:id/role` | Update user role |

### Locations (`/api/locations`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List locations |
| POST | `/` | Create location (Admin/Manager) |
| PATCH | `/:id` | Update location |

### Inventory Items (`/api/items`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List items (paginated, filterable) |
| POST | `/` | Create item |
| GET | `/:id` | Item detail with stock levels |
| PATCH | `/:id` | Update item |
| GET | `/:id/stock` | Stock by location |

### Vendors (`/api/vendors`) — cost fields hidden for non-Admin
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List vendors |
| POST | `/` | Create vendor |
| PATCH | `/:id` | Update vendor |

### Inventory Movements (`/api/inventory`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/receive` | Receiving (vendor, cost, pack, lot, delivery dt) |
| POST | `/issue` | Issue stock from location |
| POST | `/transfer` | Transfer between locations (validates no negative stock) |
| POST | `/stock-count` | Initiate stock count |
| GET | `/stock-counts` | List stock counts |
| GET | `/stock-counts/:id` | Stock count detail |
| PATCH | `/stock-counts/:id/approve` | Manager approve/reject |
| GET | `/ledger` | Query ledger (date, location, item, vendor, lot, pagination, column select) |
| GET | `/ledger/export` | Export ledger to CSV/Excel (watermarked) |
| GET | `/low-stock` | Low-stock alerts across locations |

### Reviews (`/api/reviews`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/` | Submit review (rating, text, images, tags) |
| POST | `/:id/follow-up` | Follow-up review (within 7 days) |
| POST | `/:id/reply` | Host reply (within 14 days, once) |
| GET | `/` | List reviews (filterable) |
| GET | `/:id` | Review detail |
| POST | `/:id/report` | Report review |

### Trust & Credit (`/api/trust`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/score` | Current user trust score |
| GET | `/history` | Credit change history with explanations |
| POST | `/rate` | Post-task rating |
| POST | `/appeal` | Submit appeal |
| GET | `/appeals` | User's appeals |

### Moderation (`/api/moderation`) — Moderator/Admin only
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/queue` | Pending reports |
| GET | `/reports/:id` | Report detail |
| POST | `/reports/:id/action` | Take moderation action |
| GET | `/appeals` | Pending appeals |
| PATCH | `/appeals/:id` | Resolve appeal (upheld/overturned + notes) |
| GET | `/audit` | Audit trail (Admin only) |

### Promotions (`/api/promotions`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List promotions |
| POST | `/` | Create promotion |
| PATCH | `/:id` | Update promotion |
| DELETE | `/:id` | Deactivate promotion |
| POST | `/calculate` | Calculate best discount for item(s) → breakdown + "why" |
| GET | `/:id/history` | Applied promotion history |

### Search (`/api/search`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/products` | Full-text search with filters, sort, pagination |
| GET | `/suggestions` | Suggested/autocomplete terms |
| GET | `/trending` | Trending keywords (Manager+) |

### Reports (`/api/reports`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/kpi/dashboard` | KPI dashboard data |
| GET | `/review-efficiency` | Review moderation efficiency/risk |
| POST | `/schedule` | Schedule a report for in-app download |
| GET | `/scheduled` | List user's scheduled reports |
| GET | `/scheduled/:id/download` | Download prepared report file |

---

## 5. Frontend Pages / Screens

| Route | Page | Roles | Key Features |
|-------|------|-------|-------------|
| `/login` | Login | All | Username/password form |
| `/dashboard` | Dashboard | All (role-adaptive) | Role-specific widgets, KPI cards (Manager+) |
| `/inventory` | Inventory Hub | Clerk, Manager | Stock levels grid, low-stock highlights, barcode scan input |
| `/inventory/receive` | Receiving Form | Clerk | Vendor select, lot/expiry, unit cost, pack size, delivery dt |
| `/inventory/issue` | Issue Form | Clerk | Location, item, lot selection, quantity |
| `/inventory/transfer` | Transfer Form | Clerk | From/to location, item, lot, quantity (negative-stock validation) |
| `/inventory/stock-count` | Stock Count | Clerk, Manager | Line-by-line count entry, variance display, submit/approve |
| `/inventory/ledger` | Inventory Query Center | Manager | Filters (date, location, item, vendor, lot), column picker, paginated table, export button |
| `/reviews` | Reviews List | FrontDesk, Host, Guest | Tabbed: My Reviews, Received, All |
| `/reviews/submit` | Submit Review | Guest | Rating sliders (3 dimensions), text, image upload (6 max), tag picker |
| `/reviews/:id` | Review Detail | All | Full review, follow-up link (if eligible), reply form (host), report button |
| `/trust` | Trust Dashboard | All | Trust score, credit history timeline, impact explanations, appeal button |
| `/moderation` | Moderation Queue | Moderator, Admin | Reports list, triage actions, appeal resolution |
| `/promotions` | Promotions Manager | Manager, Admin | Table of promos, create/edit with dates, priority, exclusions |
| `/promotions/calculator` | Discount Preview | Staff | Item selection → calculated best offer + breakdown |
| `/search` | Product Search | All | Search bar, filters sidebar, results grid, suggested terms |
| `/search/trending` | Trending Keywords | Manager | Trending terms table, frequency chart |
| `/reports` | Reports Center | Manager, Admin | KPI dashboard, review efficiency charts, schedule + download |
| `/admin/users` | User Management | Admin | User list, role assignment |
| `/admin/settings` | System Settings | Admin | Sensitive word dictionary, safety thresholds, rate limits |

---

## 6. Full Business Rules Checklist

### Inventory
- [ ] Transfers MUST NOT create negative stock at source location
- [ ] Stock counts require Manager approval when variance > 5% OR > $250.00
- [ ] Lot-controlled items MUST record lot number + expiration on every movement
- [ ] Every movement writes an immutable ledger entry (no updates/deletes)
- [ ] Receiving captures: vendor, unit cost (USD), pack size, delivery date/time
- [ ] Low-stock alert: triggered when on-hand < max(10 units, 7-day avg usage)
- [ ] Ledger supports aging/turnover calculation from movement timestamps
- [ ] Export watermarked with requesting username + timestamp

### Reviews
- [ ] Guest rates 1–5 on cleanliness, communication, accuracy
- [ ] Up to 6 images, each ≤ 5 MB
- [ ] Follow-up review allowed within 7 days of original, max 1 follow-up
- [ ] Predefined tags selectable
- [ ] Host can reply once, within 14 days of review creation
- [ ] Anti-spam: max 3 reviews per user per hour
- [ ] Sensitive-word filter applied on submit (locally maintained dictionary)
- [ ] Reported content queued for Moderator triage

### Trust & Credit
- [ ] Two-way post-task rating system
- [ ] Credit impact explanations shown on-screen
- [ ] Appeal path: user submits → statuses (PENDING → IN_REVIEW → UPHELD/OVERTURNED)
- [ ] Arbitration notes + final outcome stored for audit

### Moderation
- [ ] Reports go to queue with status workflow
- [ ] Moderator can WARN / HIDE / REMOVE / RESTORE
- [ ] Appeals tracked with arbitration notes
- [ ] Full audit trail (Admin-visible only)

### Promotions
- [ ] Effective start/end dates
- [ ] Mutual exclusions between promotions
- [ ] Priority-based conflict resolution: highest priority wins
- [ ] Ties broken by maximum savings
- [ ] Deterministic — same input always yields same result
- [ ] Checkout shows best offer + itemized discount breakdown
- [ ] "Why this discount applied" history stored per application

### Search
- [ ] Full-text keyword search on items
- [ ] Category + attribute filters
- [ ] Sort options (relevance, name, price, date)
- [ ] Suggested/autocomplete terms
- [ ] Trending keywords visible to Managers

### Reports & KPIs
- [ ] Nightly aggregation: DAU, conversion, AOV, repurchase rate, refund rate
- [ ] Review efficiency/risk reports
- [ ] Scheduled report = in-app download prepared at chosen time (no email/SMS)

### Security
- [ ] Passwords hashed with bcrypt + per-user salt
- [ ] Phone numbers masked in UI, encrypted at rest (AES-256)
- [ ] Exports watermarked with username + timestamp
- [ ] RBAC: non-admin cannot view vendor costs, credit-rule config, moderation audit
- [ ] Fully offline — no external API calls

### Caching
- [ ] In-memory TTL cache, default 15-minute invalidation
- [ ] Applied to: search results, stock levels, KPI dashboard, trending terms

---

## 7. Testing Strategy

### Structure
```
unit_tests/
├── inventory.test.ts       # stock calc, negative-stock guard, variance threshold, ledger immutability
├── reviews.test.ts         # rating validation, 7-day follow-up, 14-day reply, image limits
├── promotions.test.ts      # priority resolution, tie-breaking, mutual exclusion, date validity
├── trust.test.ts           # credit calculation, appeal status transitions
├── moderation.test.ts      # sensitive-word filter, rate limit logic
├── search.test.ts          # query building, suggestion logic
├── auth.test.ts            # password hashing, JWT creation, role checks
├── exporter.test.ts        # watermark insertion, CSV/Excel generation
└── cache.test.ts           # TTL expiration, invalidation

API_tests/
├── auth.test.ts            # register, login, token validation, role enforcement
├── inventory.test.ts       # receive, issue, transfer (happy + negative-stock reject), stock-count approval flow
├── reviews.test.ts         # create, follow-up timing, host reply, rate limit, image upload
├── trust.test.ts           # rate, appeal flow
├── moderation.test.ts      # queue, action, appeal resolve, audit access control
├── promotions.test.ts      # CRUD, calculate endpoint, conflict resolution
├── search.test.ts          # full-text results, filters, suggestions, trending
├── reports.test.ts         # KPI data, schedule + download
└── rbac.test.ts            # vendor cost visibility, admin-only routes

run_tests.sh                # #!/bin/bash — runs both suites, exits non-zero on failure
```

`run_tests.sh` will:
1. Start test containers via `docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d`
2. Wait for MySQL health
3. Run Prisma migrations on test DB
4. Run `npx vitest run --config unit_tests/vitest.config.ts`
5. Run `npx vitest run --config API_tests/vitest.config.ts`
6. Tear down containers
7. Exit with combined status code

Unit tests use pure function testing (no DB). API tests use Supertest against the running Express app with a test database.

---

## 8. Implementation Order (10 Passes)

| Pass | Module | Rationale |
|------|--------|-----------|
| **1** | Docker Compose + MySQL + project scaffolding | Foundation — everything else depends on this starting |
| **2** | Prisma schema + migrations + seed | DB must exist before any API |
| **3** | Auth module (backend + frontend login) | All routes need auth middleware |
| **4** | Locations + Items + Vendors (CRUD) | Core reference data for inventory |
| **5** | Inventory movements + ledger + low-stock + query center + export | Largest domain, core business value |
| **6** | Reviews + images + tags + host replies | Second major domain |
| **7** | Trust/credit + moderation + sensitive-word filter + appeals | Depends on reviews existing |
| **8** | Promotions engine + conflict resolution + checkout breakdown | Independent domain |
| **9** | Search (full-text + filters + suggestions + trending) + Reports/KPI (nightly job + scheduled downloads) | Read-heavy features, can layer on top |
| **10** | Testing suites + run_tests.sh + README + final hardening | Verification pass |

---

## 9. Top 10 Acceptance Risks

| # | Risk | Mitigation |
|---|------|------------|
| 1 | **`docker compose up` fails** — migration timing, port conflict | MySQL healthcheck + entrypoint waits with retry loop; explicitly expose 3306/3000/5173 |
| 2 | **Negative stock not actually enforced** | Use DB transaction with `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE` on stock_levels; unit test + API test both verify rejection |
| 3 | **Stock count approval threshold missed** | Service calculates both % and $ variance; test with values at boundary (4.9% pass, 5.1% fail) |
| 4 | **Immutable ledger violated** | No UPDATE/DELETE Prisma operations on ledger table; enforce at service layer; test attempts to modify are rejected |
| 5 | **Review timing rules wrong** (7-day follow-up, 14-day reply, 3/hr limit) | All time checks use `created_at` comparison in service; API tests with mocked clock at boundary |
| 6 | **Promotion conflict resolution non-deterministic** | Sort by priority DESC then discount DESC; test with identical priorities confirms max-savings wins consistently |
| 7 | **Export missing watermark** | ExcelJS header/footer + CSV comment row; test verifies username+timestamp present in output bytes |
| 8 | **RBAC holes** — non-admin sees vendor costs or audit trail | Middleware checks role before controller; dedicated `rbac.test.ts` tests every protected endpoint with wrong role |
| 9 | **Sensitive-word filter bypass** | Filter runs on normalized text (lowercase, stripped punctuation); test with variations |
| 10 | **Missing full-text search** — MySQL FULLTEXT not created | Prisma `@@fulltext` annotation; migration verified; search test confirms relevance-ranked results |

---

## 10. Recommended Next-Step Prompt

For the first code generation pass, use this prompt:

> **"Generate Pass 1 + 2 + 3: Project scaffolding with Docker Compose (MySQL 8 + backend + frontend services), full Prisma schema with all 35 tables, migrations, seed data (roles, locations, sensitive words, demo users), auth module (register/login/me with bcrypt + JWT + role middleware), and the Vue frontend shell with login page, router with role guards, Pinia auth store, and Axios setup. Ensure `docker compose up` brings everything to a working login flow."**

This front-loads the foundation so every subsequent pass can build incrementally on a running system.

You are acting as a senior production engineer and staff-level full-stack architect working inside an existing repository.

{"file_path": "/home/nahom/Desktop/Others/EaglePointAI/vibe-coding-projects/week-2/HarborOps/TASK-87/repo/docker-compose.yml", "content": "version: "3.8"

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: harborops-mysql
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: harborops_root_pass
      MYSQL_DATABASE: harborops
      MYSQL_USER: harborops
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: harborops_pass
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-pharborops_root_pass"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 30
      start_period: 30s
    command: >
      --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password
      --character-set-type=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --innodb-ft-min-token-size=2
    networks:
      - harborops

  backend:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: harborops-backend
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: "3000"
      DATABASE_URL: "mysql://harborops:harborops_pass@mysql:3306/harborops"
      JWT_SECRET: "harborops-jwt-secret-change-in-production-2024"
      ENCRYPTION_KEY: "a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6"
      UPLOAD_DIR: "/app/uploads"
      LOG_LEVEL: "info"
      CACHE_TTL_MINUTES: "15"
    volumes:
      - upload_data:/app/uploads
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "--no-verbose", "--tries=1", "--spider", "http://localhost:3000/api/health"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 20s
    networks:
      - harborops

  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: harborops-frontend
    ports:
      - "5173:80"
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - harborops

volumes:
  mysql_data:
    driver: local
  upload_data:
    driver: local

networks:
  harborops:
    driver: bridge
"}

WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./
RUN npm install

COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY prisma ./prisma/
COPY src ./src/

RUN npx prisma generate
RUN npx tsc --outDir dist

FROM node:20-alpine

RUN apk add --no-cache wget

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /app/package.json /app/package-lock.json* ./
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/prisma ./prisma
COPY entrypoint.sh ./

RUN chmod +x entrypoint.sh && mkdir -p /app/uploads

EXPOSE 3000

ENTRYPOINT ["./entrypoint.sh"]
"}

    "typescript": "^5.6.3",
    "vitest": "^2.1.5"
  },
  "prisma": {
    "seed": "ts-node prisma/seed.ts"
  }
}
"}

content.arguments:
{"file_path": "/home/nahom/Desktop/Others/EaglePointAI/vibe-coding-projects/week-2/HarborOps/TASK-87/repo/backend/prisma/schema.prisma", "content": "generator client {
  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
  previewFeatures = ["fullTextSearch", "fullTextIndex"]
}

datasource db {
  provider = "mysql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ─── AUTH & USERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────

enum Role {
  ADMIN
  MANAGER
  INVENTORY_CLERK
  FRONT_DESK
  HOST
  GUEST
  MODERATOR
}

model User {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  username        String   @unique @db.VarChar(100)
  passwordHash    String   @map("password_hash") @db.VarChar(255)
  salt            String   @db.VarChar(64)
  role            Role     @default(GUEST)
  displayName     String   @map("display_name") @db.VarChar(200)
  phoneEncrypted  String?  @map("phone_encrypted") @db.VarChar(500)
  phoneMasked     String?  @map("phone_masked") @db.VarChar(20)
  isActive        Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  // Relations
  ledgerEntries       InventoryLedger[]   @relation("performer")
  approvedLedgers     InventoryLedger[]   @relation("approver")
  stockCountsInitiated StockCount[]       @relation("initiator")
  stockCountsApproved  StockCount[]       @relation("stockApprover")
  reviewsWritten      Review[]            @relation("reviewer")
  reviewsReceived     Review[]            @relation("reviewee")
  hostReplies         HostReply[]
  trustScore          TrustScore?
  creditHistory       CreditHistory[]
  reportsSubmitted    Report[]            @relation("reporter")
  reportsAssigned     Report[]            @relation("assignee")
  moderationActions   ModerationAction[]
  appeals             Appeal[]
  searchLogs          SearchLog[]
  scheduledReports    ScheduledReport[]
  rateLimitLogs       RateLimitLog[]
  taskRatingsGiven    TaskRating[]        @relation("taskRater")
  taskRatingsReceived TaskRating[]        @relation("taskRatee")

  @@map("users")
}

// ─── LOCATIONS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

model Location {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name      String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  address   String?  @db.VarChar(500)
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  stockLevels     StockLevel[]
  ledgerFrom      InventoryLedger[] @relation("fromLocation")
  ledgerTo        InventoryLedger[] @relation("toLocation")
  stockCounts     StockCount[]

  @@map("locations")
}

// ─── INVENTORY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

model Item {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name            String   @db.VarChar(200)
  sku             String   @unique @db.VarChar(100)
  category        String   @db.VarChar(100)
  description     String?  @db.Text
  isLotControlled Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_lot_controlled")
  unitOfMeasure   String   @default("EA") @map("unit_of_measure") @db.VarChar(20)
  unitPrice       Decimal? @map("unit_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  isActive        Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  lots              Lot[]
  stockLevels       StockLevel[]
  ledgerEntries     InventoryLedger[]
  stockCountLines   StockCountLine[]
  promotionItems    PromotionItem[]
  productAttributes ProductAttribute[]
  appliedPromotions AppliedPromotion[]

  @@fulltext([name, description, sku])
  @@map("items")
}

model Vendor {
  id                Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name              String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  contactEncrypted  String?  @map("contact_encrypted") @db.VarChar(500)
  isActive          Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  ledgerEntries InventoryLedger[]

  @@map("vendors")
}

model Lot {
  id             Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId         Int       @map("item_id")
  lotNumber      String    @map("lot_number") @db.VarChar(100)
  expirationDate DateTime? @map("expiration_date")
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  item          Item              @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  stockLevels   StockLevel[]
  ledgerEntries InventoryLedger[]
  stockCountLines StockCountLine[]

  @@unique([itemId, lotNumber])
  @@map("lots")
}

model StockLevel {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId          Int      @map("item_id")
  locationId      Int      @map("location_id")
  lotId           Int?     @map("lot_id")
  onHand          Int      @default(0) @map("on_hand")
  safetyThreshold Int      @default(10) @map("safety_threshold")
  avgDailyUsage   Decimal  @default(0) @map("avg_daily_usage") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  item     Item     @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  location Location @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  lot      Lot?     @relation(fields: [lotId], references: [id])

  @@unique([itemId, locationId, lotId])
  @@map("stock_levels")
}

// ─── INVENTORY LEDGER (immutable) ───────────────────────────────

enum MovementType {
  RECEIVING
  ISSUE
  TRANSFER
  STOCK_COUNT
  ADJUSTMENT
}

model InventoryLedger {
  id               Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId           Int          @map("item_id")
  lotId            Int?         @map("lot_id")
  fromLocationId   Int?         @map("from_location_id")
  toLocationId     Int?         @map("to_location_id")
  movementType     MovementType @map("movement_type")
  quantity         Int
  unitCostUsd      Decimal?     @map("unit_cost_usd") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  vendorId         Int?         @map("vendor_id")
  packSize         Int?         @map("pack_size")
  deliveryDatetime DateTime?    @map("delivery_datetime")
  referenceNumber  String       @map("reference_number") @db.VarChar(100)
  performedBy      Int          @map("performed_by")
  approvedBy       Int?         @map("approved_by")
  notes            String?      @db.Text
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  item         Item      @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  lot          Lot?      @relation(fields: [lotId], references: [id])
  fromLocation Location? @relation("fromLocation", fields: [fromLocationId], references: [id])
  toLocation   Location? @relation("toLocation", fields: [toLocationId], references: [id])
  vendor       Vendor?   @relation(fields: [vendorId], references: [id])
  performer    User      @relation("performer", fields: [performedBy], references: [id])
  approver     User?     @relation("approver", fields: [approvedBy], references: [id])

  @@index([itemId, createdAt])
  @@index([fromLocationId, movementType, createdAt])
  @@index([toLocationId, movementType, createdAt])
  @@index([vendorId, createdAt])
  @@index([lotId])
  @@map("inventory_ledger")
}

// ─── STOCK COUNTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────

enum StockCountStatus {
  DRAFT
  PENDING_APPROVAL
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
}

model StockCount {
  id          Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  locationId  Int              @map("location_id")
  initiatedBy Int              @map("initiated_by")
  status      StockCountStatus @default(DRAFT)
  variancePct Decimal?         @map("variance_pct") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  varianceUsd Decimal?         @map("variance_usd") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  approvedBy  Int?             @map("approved_by")
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  completedAt DateTime?        @map("completed_at")

  location  Location         @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  initiator User             @relation("initiator", fields: [initiatedBy], references: [id])
  approver  User?            @relation("stockApprover", fields: [approvedBy], references: [id])
  lines     StockCountLine[]

  @@map("stock_counts")
}

model StockCountLine {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  stockCountId Int      @map("stock_count_id")
  itemId       Int      @map("item_id")
  lotId        Int?     @map("lot_id")
  systemQty    Int      @map("system_qty")
  countedQty   Int      @map("counted_qty")
  varianceQty  Int      @map("variance_qty")
  variancePct  Decimal? @map("variance_pct") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  varianceUsd  Decimal? @map("variance_usd") @db.Decimal(10, 2)

  stockCount StockCount @relation(fields: [stockCountId], references: [id])
  item       Item       @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  lot        Lot?       @relation(fields: [lotId], references: [id])

  @@map("stock_count_lines")
}

// ─── REVIEWS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum ReviewStatus {
  ACTIVE
  FLAGGED
  HIDDEN
  REMOVED
}

enum ReviewTargetType {
  STAY
  TASK
}

model Review {
  id                   Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewerId           Int              @map("reviewer_id")
  revieweeId           Int?             @map("reviewee_id")
  targetType           ReviewTargetType @map("target_type")
  targetId             Int              @map("target_id")
  ratingCleanliness    Int              @map("rating_cleanliness") @db.TinyInt
  ratingCommunication  Int              @map("rating_communication") @db.TinyInt
  ratingAccuracy       Int              @map("rating_accuracy") @db.TinyInt
  overallRating        Decimal          @map("overall_rating") @db.Decimal(2, 1)
  text                 String?          @db.Text
  isFollowUp           Boolean          @default(false) @map("is_follow_up")
  parentReviewId       Int?             @map("parent_review_id")
  status               ReviewStatus     @default(ACTIVE)
  createdAt            DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  reviewer      User          @relation("reviewer", fields: [reviewerId], references: [id])
  reviewee      User?         @relation("reviewee", fields: [revieweeId], references: [id])
  parentReview  Review?       @relation("followUps", fields: [parentReviewId], references: [id])
  followUps     Review[]      @relation("followUps")
  images        ReviewImage[]
  tags          ReviewTag[]
  hostReply     HostReply?
  reports       Report[]

  @@fulltext([text])
  @@map("reviews")
}

model ReviewImage {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewId   Int      @map("review_id")
  filePath   String   @map("file_path") @db.VarChar(500)
  fileSize   Int      @map("file_size")
  uploadedAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("uploaded_at")

  review Review @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])

  @@map("review_images")
}

model Tag {
  id       Int         @id @default(autoincrement())
  name     String      @unique @db.VarChar(100)
  category String?     @db.VarChar(100)

  reviews ReviewTag[]

  @@map("tags")
}

model ReviewTag {
  id       Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewId Int @map("review_id")
  tagId    Int @map("tag_id")

  review Review @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])
  tag    Tag    @relation(fields: [tagId], references: [id])

  @@unique([reviewId, tagId])
  @@map("review_tags")
}

model HostReply {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewId  Int      @unique @map("review_id")
  hostId    Int      @map("host_id")
  text      String   @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  review Review @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])
  host   User   @relation(fields: [hostId], references: [id])

  @@map("host_replies")
}

// ─── TRUST & CREDIT ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model TrustScore {
  id          Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId      Int      @unique @map("user_id")
  score       Decimal  @default(50.00) @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  lastUpdated DateTime @default(now()) @map("last_updated")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@map("trust_scores")
}

model CreditHistory {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId       Int      @map("user_id")
  changeAmount Decimal  @map("change_amount") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  reason       String   @db.VarChar(500)
  sourceType   String   @map("source_type") @db.VarChar(50)
  sourceId     Int      @map("source_id")
  explanation  String   @db.Text
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([userId, createdAt])
  @@map("credit_history")
}

model TaskRating {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  raterId   Int      @map("rater_id")
  rateeId   Int      @map("ratee_id")
  taskId    Int      @map("task_id")
  rating    Int      @db.TinyInt
  comment   String?  @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  rater User @relation("taskRater", fields: [raterId], references: [id])
  ratee User @relation("taskRatee", fields: [rateeId], references: [id])

  @@unique([raterId, taskId])
  @@map("task_ratings")
}

// ─── MODERATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum ReportStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_REVIEW
  RESOLVED
  DISMISSED
}

enum ModerationActionType {
  WARN
  HIDE
  REMOVE
  RESTORE
}

model Report {
  id          Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  reporterId  Int          @map("reporter_id")
  contentType String       @map("content_type") @db.VarChar(50)
  contentId   Int          @map("content_id")
  reviewId    Int?         @map("review_id")
  reason      String       @db.Text
  status      ReportStatus @default(PENDING)
  assignedTo  Int?         @map("assigned_to")
  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  resolvedAt  DateTime?    @map("resolved_at")

  reporter User              @relation("reporter", fields: [reporterId], references: [id])
  assignee User?             @relation("assignee", fields: [assignedTo], references: [id])
  review   Review?           @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])
  actions  ModerationAction[]

  @@map("reports")
}

model ModerationAction {
  id          Int                  @id @default(autoincrement())
  reportId    Int                  @map("report_id")
  moderatorId Int                  @map("moderator_id")
  action      ModerationActionType
  notes       String?              @db.Text
  createdAt   DateTime             @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  report    Report   @relation(fields: [reportId], references: [id])
  moderator User     @relation(fields: [moderatorId], references: [id])
  appeals   Appeal[]

  @@map("moderation_actions")
}

enum AppealStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_REVIEW
  UPHELD
  OVERTURNED
}

model Appeal {
  id                 Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId             Int          @map("user_id")
  moderationActionId Int          @map("moderation_action_id")
  status             AppealStatus @default(PENDING)
  userStatement      String       @map("user_statement") @db.Text
  arbitrationNotes   String?      @map("arbitration_notes") @db.Text
  outcome            String?      @db.Text
  createdAt          DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  resolvedAt         DateTime?    @map("resolved_at")

  user             User             @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  moderationAction ModerationAction @relation(fields: [moderationActionId], references: [id])

  @@map("appeals")
}

model SensitiveWord {
  id       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  word     String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  category String?  @db.VarChar(100)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  @@map("sensitive_words")
}

// ─── PROMOTIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum DiscountType {
  PERCENTAGE
  FIXED_AMOUNT
}

model Promotion {
  id             Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  name           String       @db.VarChar(200)
  description    String?      @db.Text
  discountType   DiscountType @map("discount_type")
  discountValue  Decimal      @map("discount_value") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  effectiveStart DateTime     @map("effective_start")
  effectiveEnd   DateTime     @map("effective_end")
  priority       Int          @default(0)
  isActive       Boolean      @default(true) @map("is_active")
  conditions     Json?
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  exclusionsFrom PromotionExclusion[] @relation("excluder")
  exclusionsTo   PromotionExclusion[] @relation("excluded")
  items          PromotionItem[]
  applications   AppliedPromotion[]

  @@index([isActive, priority, effectiveStart, effectiveEnd])
  @@map("promotions")
}

model PromotionExclusion {
  id                  Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  promotionId         Int @map("promotion_id")
  excludedPromotionId Int @map("excluded_promotion_id")

  promotion         Promotion @relation("excluder", fields: [promotionId], references: [id])
  excludedPromotion Promotion @relation("excluded", fields: [excludedPromotionId], references: [id])

  @@unique([promotionId, excludedPromotionId])
  @@map("promotion_exclusions")
}

model PromotionItem {
  id          Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  promotionId Int @map("promotion_id")
  itemId      Int @map("item_id")

  promotion Promotion @relation(fields: [promotionId], references: [id])
  item      Item      @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])

  @@unique([promotionId, itemId])
  @@map("promotion_items")
}

model AppliedPromotion {
  id             Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId         Int      @map("item_id")
  promotionId    Int      @map("promotion_id")
  originalPrice  Decimal  @map("original_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  discountAmount Decimal  @map("discount_amount") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  finalPrice     Decimal  @map("final_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  reasonApplied  String   @map("reason_applied") @db.Text
  appliedAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("applied_at")

  item      Item      @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  promotion Promotion @relation(fields: [promotionId], references: [id])

  @@map("applied_promotions")
}

// ─── SEARCH ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

model ProductAttribute {
  id             Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId         Int    @map("item_id")
  attributeName  String @map("attribute_name") @db.VarChar(100)
  attributeValue String @map("attribute_value") @db.VarChar(255)

  item Item @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])

  @@index([attributeName, attributeValue])
  @@map("product_attributes")
}

model SearchLog {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId       Int?     @map("user_id")
  queryText    String   @map("query_text") @db.VarChar(500)
  resultsCount Int      @map("results_count")
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user User? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([createdAt])
  @@fulltext([queryText])
  @@map("search_logs")
}

model SuggestedTerm {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  term       String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  frequency  Int      @default(0)
  isTrending Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_trending")
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  @@map("suggested_terms")
}

// ─── REPORTS & KPIs ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model KpiDaily {
  id             Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  date           DateTime @unique @db.Date
  dau            Int      @default(0)
  conversionRate Decimal  @default(0) @map("conversion_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  aov            Decimal  @default(0) @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  repurchaseRate Decimal  @default(0) @map("repurchase_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  refundRate     Decimal  @default(0) @map("refund_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)

  @@map("kpi_daily")
}

model ReportReviewEfficiency {
  id                  Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  date                DateTime @unique @db.Date
  avgModerationTimeHrs Decimal @default(0) @map("avg_moderation_time_hrs") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  flaggedCount        Int      @default(0) @map("flagged_count")
  resolvedCount       Int      @default(0) @map("resolved_count")
  appealRate          Decimal  @default(0) @map("appeal_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)

  @@map("report_review_efficiency")
}

model ScheduledReport {
  id            Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  reportType    String   @map("report_type") @db.VarChar(100)
  requestedBy   Int      @map("requested_by")
  scheduledTime DateTime @map("scheduled_time")
  status        String   @default("PENDING") @db.VarChar(50)
  filePath      String?  @map("file_path") @db.VarChar(500)
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  completedAt   DateTime? @map("completed_at")

  requester User @relation(fields: [requestedBy], references: [id])

  @@map("scheduled_reports")
}

// ─── RATE LIMITING ──────────────────────────────────────────────

model RateLimitLog {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId    Int      @map("user_id")
  action    String   @db.VarChar(100)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([userId, action, createdAt])
  @@map("rate_limit_logs")
}
"}

function.arguments:
{"file_path": "/home/nahom/Desktop/Others/EaglePointAI/vibe-coding-projects/week-2/HarborOps/TASK-87/repo/backend/prisma/schema.prisma", "content": "generator client {
  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
  previewFeatures = ["fullTextSearch", "fullTextIndex"]
}

datasource db {
  provider = "mysql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ─── AUTH & USERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────

enum Role {
  ADMIN
  MANAGER
  INVENTORY_CLERK
  FRONT_DESK
  HOST
  GUEST
  MODERATOR
}

model User {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  username        String   @unique @db.VarChar(100)
  passwordHash    String   @map("password_hash") @db.VarChar(255)
  salt            String   @db.VarChar(64)
  role            Role     @default(GUEST)
  displayName     String   @map("display_name") @db.VarChar(200)
  phoneEncrypted  String?  @map("phone_encrypted") @db.VarChar(500)
  phoneMasked     String?  @map("phone_masked") @db.VarChar(20)
  isActive        Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  // Relations
  ledgerEntries       InventoryLedger[]   @relation("performer")
  approvedLedgers     InventoryLedger[]   @relation("approver")
  stockCountsInitiated StockCount[]       @relation("initiator")
  stockCountsApproved  StockCount[]       @relation("stockApprover")
  reviewsWritten      Review[]            @relation("reviewer")
  reviewsReceived     Review[]            @relation("reviewee")
  hostReplies         HostReply[]
  trustScore          TrustScore?
  creditHistory       CreditHistory[]
  reportsSubmitted    Report[]            @relation("reporter")
  reportsAssigned     Report[]            @relation("assignee")
  moderationActions   ModerationAction[]
  appeals             Appeal[]
  searchLogs          SearchLog[]
  scheduledReports    ScheduledReport[]
  rateLimitLogs       RateLimitLog[]
  taskRatingsGiven    TaskRating[]        @relation("taskRater")
  taskRatingsReceived TaskRating[]        @relation("taskRatee")

  @@map("users")
}

// ─── LOCATIONS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

model Location {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name      String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  address   String?  @db.VarChar(500)
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  stockLevels     StockLevel[]
  ledgerFrom      InventoryLedger[] @relation("fromLocation")
  ledgerTo        InventoryLedger[] @relation("toLocation")
  stockCounts     StockCount[]

  @@map("locations")
}

// ─── INVENTORY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

model Item {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name            String   @db.VarChar(200)
  sku             String   @unique @db.VarChar(100)
  category        String   @db.VarChar(100)
  description     String?  @db.Text
  isLotControlled Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_lot_controlled")
  unitOfMeasure   String   @default("EA") @map("unit_of_measure") @db.VarChar(20)
  unitPrice       Decimal? @map("unit_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  isActive        Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  lots              Lot[]
  stockLevels       StockLevel[]
  ledgerEntries     InventoryLedger[]
  stockCountLines   StockCountLine[]
  promotionItems    PromotionItem[]
  productAttributes ProductAttribute[]
  appliedPromotions AppliedPromotion[]

  @@fulltext([name, description, sku])
  @@map("items")
}

model Vendor {
  id                Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name              String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  contactEncrypted  String?  @map("contact_encrypted") @db.VarChar(500)
  isActive          Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  ledgerEntries InventoryLedger[]

  @@map("vendors")
}

model Lot {
  id             Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId         Int       @map("item_id")
  lotNumber      String    @map("lot_number") @db.VarChar(100)
  expirationDate DateTime? @map("expiration_date")
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  item          Item              @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  stockLevels   StockLevel[]
  ledgerEntries InventoryLedger[]
  stockCountLines StockCountLine[]

  @@unique([itemId, lotNumber])
  @@map("lots")
}

model StockLevel {
  id              Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId          Int      @map("item_id")
  locationId      Int      @map("location_id")
  lotId           Int?     @map("lot_id")
  onHand          Int      @default(0) @map("on_hand")
  safetyThreshold Int      @default(10) @map("safety_threshold")
  avgDailyUsage   Decimal  @default(0) @map("avg_daily_usage") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  item     Item     @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  location Location @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  lot      Lot?     @relation(fields: [lotId], references: [id])

  @@unique([itemId, locationId, lotId])
  @@map("stock_levels")
}

// ─── INVENTORY LEDGER (immutable) ───────────────────────────────

enum MovementType {
  RECEIVING
  ISSUE
  TRANSFER
  STOCK_COUNT
  ADJUSTMENT
}

model InventoryLedger {
  id               Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId           Int          @map("item_id")
  lotId            Int?         @map("lot_id")
  fromLocationId   Int?         @map("from_location_id")
  toLocationId     Int?         @map("to_location_id")
  movementType     MovementType @map("movement_type")
  quantity         Int
  unitCostUsd      Decimal?     @map("unit_cost_usd") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  vendorId         Int?         @map("vendor_id")
  packSize         Int?         @map("pack_size")
  deliveryDatetime DateTime?    @map("delivery_datetime")
  referenceNumber  String       @map("reference_number") @db.VarChar(100)
  performedBy      Int          @map("performed_by")
  approvedBy       Int?         @map("approved_by")
  notes            String?      @db.Text
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  item         Item      @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  lot          Lot?      @relation(fields: [lotId], references: [id])
  fromLocation Location? @relation("fromLocation", fields: [fromLocationId], references: [id])
  toLocation   Location? @relation("toLocation", fields: [toLocationId], references: [id])
  vendor       Vendor?   @relation(fields: [vendorId], references: [id])
  performer    User      @relation("performer", fields: [performedBy], references: [id])
  approver     User?     @relation("approver", fields: [approvedBy], references: [id])

  @@index([itemId, createdAt])
  @@index([fromLocationId, movementType, createdAt])
  @@index([toLocationId, movementType, createdAt])
  @@index([vendorId, createdAt])
  @@index([lotId])
  @@map("inventory_ledger")
}

// ─── STOCK COUNTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────

enum StockCountStatus {
  DRAFT
  PENDING_APPROVAL
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
}

model StockCount {
  id          Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  locationId  Int              @map("location_id")
  initiatedBy Int              @map("initiated_by")
  status      StockCountStatus @default(DRAFT)
  variancePct Decimal?         @map("variance_pct") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  varianceUsd Decimal?         @map("variance_usd") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  approvedBy  Int?             @map("approved_by")
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  completedAt DateTime?        @map("completed_at")

  location  Location         @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  initiator User             @relation("initiator", fields: [initiatedBy], references: [id])
  approver  User?            @relation("stockApprover", fields: [approvedBy], references: [id])
  lines     StockCountLine[]

  @@map("stock_counts")
}

model StockCountLine {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  stockCountId Int      @map("stock_count_id")
  itemId       Int      @map("item_id")
  lotId        Int?     @map("lot_id")
  systemQty    Int      @map("system_qty")
  countedQty   Int      @map("counted_qty")
  varianceQty  Int      @map("variance_qty")
  variancePct  Decimal? @map("variance_pct") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  varianceUsd  Decimal? @map("variance_usd") @db.Decimal(10, 2)

  stockCount StockCount @relation(fields: [stockCountId], references: [id])
  item       Item       @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  lot        Lot?       @relation(fields: [lotId], references: [id])

  @@map("stock_count_lines")
}

// ─── REVIEWS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum ReviewStatus {
  ACTIVE
  FLAGGED
  HIDDEN
  REMOVED
}

enum ReviewTargetType {
  STAY
  TASK
}

model Review {
  id                   Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewerId           Int              @map("reviewer_id")
  revieweeId           Int?             @map("reviewee_id")
  targetType           ReviewTargetType @map("target_type")
  targetId             Int              @map("target_id")
  ratingCleanliness    Int              @map("rating_cleanliness") @db.TinyInt
  ratingCommunication  Int              @map("rating_communication") @db.TinyInt
  ratingAccuracy       Int              @map("rating_accuracy") @db.TinyInt
  overallRating        Decimal          @map("overall_rating") @db.Decimal(2, 1)
  text                 String?          @db.Text
  isFollowUp           Boolean          @default(false) @map("is_follow_up")
  parentReviewId       Int?             @map("parent_review_id")
  status               ReviewStatus     @default(ACTIVE)
  createdAt            DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  reviewer      User          @relation("reviewer", fields: [reviewerId], references: [id])
  reviewee      User?         @relation("reviewee", fields: [revieweeId], references: [id])
  parentReview  Review?       @relation("followUps", fields: [parentReviewId], references: [id])
  followUps     Review[]      @relation("followUps")
  images        ReviewImage[]
  tags          ReviewTag[]
  hostReply     HostReply?
  reports       Report[]

  @@fulltext([text])
  @@map("reviews")
}

model ReviewImage {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewId   Int      @map("review_id")
  filePath   String   @map("file_path") @db.VarChar(500)
  fileSize   Int      @map("file_size")
  uploadedAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("uploaded_at")

  review Review @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])

  @@map("review_images")
}

model Tag {
  id       Int         @id @default(autoincrement())
  name     String      @unique @db.VarChar(100)
  category String?     @db.VarChar(100)

  reviews ReviewTag[]

  @@map("tags")
}

model ReviewTag {
  id       Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewId Int @map("review_id")
  tagId    Int @map("tag_id")

  review Review @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])
  tag    Tag    @relation(fields: [tagId], references: [id])

  @@unique([reviewId, tagId])
  @@map("review_tags")
}

model HostReply {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  reviewId  Int      @unique @map("review_id")
  hostId    Int      @map("host_id")
  text      String   @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  review Review @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])
  host   User   @relation(fields: [hostId], references: [id])

  @@map("host_replies")
}

// ─── TRUST & CREDIT ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model TrustScore {
  id          Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId      Int      @unique @map("user_id")
  score       Decimal  @default(50.00) @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  lastUpdated DateTime @default(now()) @map("last_updated")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@map("trust_scores")
}

model CreditHistory {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId       Int      @map("user_id")
  changeAmount Decimal  @map("change_amount") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  reason       String   @db.VarChar(500)
  sourceType   String   @map("source_type") @db.VarChar(50)
  sourceId     Int      @map("source_id")
  explanation  String   @db.Text
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([userId, createdAt])
  @@map("credit_history")
}

model TaskRating {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  raterId   Int      @map("rater_id")
  rateeId   Int      @map("ratee_id")
  taskId    Int      @map("task_id")
  rating    Int      @db.TinyInt
  comment   String?  @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  rater User @relation("taskRater", fields: [raterId], references: [id])
  ratee User @relation("taskRatee", fields: [rateeId], references: [id])

  @@unique([raterId, taskId])
  @@map("task_ratings")
}

// ─── MODERATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum ReportStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_REVIEW
  RESOLVED
  DISMISSED
}

enum ModerationActionType {
  WARN
  HIDE
  REMOVE
  RESTORE
}

model Report {
  id          Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  reporterId  Int          @map("reporter_id")
  contentType String       @map("content_type") @db.VarChar(50)
  contentId   Int          @map("content_id")
  reviewId    Int?         @map("review_id")
  reason      String       @db.Text
  status      ReportStatus @default(PENDING)
  assignedTo  Int?         @map("assigned_to")
  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  resolvedAt  DateTime?    @map("resolved_at")

  reporter User              @relation("reporter", fields: [reporterId], references: [id])
  assignee User?             @relation("assignee", fields: [assignedTo], references: [id])
  review   Review?           @relation(fields: [reviewId], references: [id])
  actions  ModerationAction[]

  @@map("reports")
}

model ModerationAction {
  id          Int                  @id @default(autoincrement())
  reportId    Int                  @map("report_id")
  moderatorId Int                  @map("moderator_id")
  action      ModerationActionType
  notes       String?              @db.Text
  createdAt   DateTime             @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  report    Report   @relation(fields: [reportId], references: [id])
  moderator User     @relation(fields: [moderatorId], references: [id])
  appeals   Appeal[]

  @@map("moderation_actions")
}

enum AppealStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_REVIEW
  UPHELD
  OVERTURNED
}

model Appeal {
  id                 Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId             Int          @map("user_id")
  moderationActionId Int          @map("moderation_action_id")
  status             AppealStatus @default(PENDING)
  userStatement      String       @map("user_statement") @db.Text
  arbitrationNotes   String?      @map("arbitration_notes") @db.Text
  outcome            String?      @db.Text
  createdAt          DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  resolvedAt         DateTime?    @map("resolved_at")

  user             User             @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  moderationAction ModerationAction @relation(fields: [moderationActionId], references: [id])

  @@map("appeals")
}

model SensitiveWord {
  id       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  word     String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  category String?  @db.VarChar(100)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  @@map("sensitive_words")
}

// ─── PROMOTIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum DiscountType {
  PERCENTAGE
  FIXED_AMOUNT
}

model Promotion {
  id             Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  name           String       @db.VarChar(200)
  description    String?      @db.Text
  discountType   DiscountType @map("discount_type")
  discountValue  Decimal      @map("discount_value") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  effectiveStart DateTime     @map("effective_start")
  effectiveEnd   DateTime     @map("effective_end")
  priority       Int          @default(0)
  isActive       Boolean      @default(true) @map("is_active")
  conditions     Json?
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  exclusionsFrom PromotionExclusion[] @relation("excluder")
  exclusionsTo   PromotionExclusion[] @relation("excluded")
  items          PromotionItem[]
  applications   AppliedPromotion[]

  @@index([isActive, priority, effectiveStart, effectiveEnd])
  @@map("promotions")
}

model PromotionExclusion {
  id                  Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  promotionId         Int @map("promotion_id")
  excludedPromotionId Int @map("excluded_promotion_id")

  promotion         Promotion @relation("excluder", fields: [promotionId], references: [id])
  excludedPromotion Promotion @relation("excluded", fields: [excludedPromotionId], references: [id])

  @@unique([promotionId, excludedPromotionId])
  @@map("promotion_exclusions")
}

model PromotionItem {
  id          Int @id @default(autoincrement())
  promotionId Int @map("promotion_id")
  itemId      Int @map("item_id")

  promotion Promotion @relation(fields: [promotionId], references: [id])
  item      Item      @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])

  @@unique([promotionId, itemId])
  @@map("promotion_items")
}

model AppliedPromotion {
  id             Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId         Int      @map("item_id")
  promotionId    Int      @map("promotion_id")
  originalPrice  Decimal  @map("original_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  discountAmount Decimal  @map("discount_amount") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  finalPrice     Decimal  @map("final_price") @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  reasonApplied  String   @map("reason_applied") @db.Text
  appliedAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("applied_at")

  item      Item      @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  promotion Promotion @relation(fields: [promotionId], references: [id])

  @@map("applied_promotions")
}

// ─── SEARCH ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

model ProductAttribute {
  id             Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  itemId         Int    @map("item_id")
  attributeName  String @map("attribute_name") @db.VarChar(100)
  attributeValue String @map("attribute_value") @db.VarChar(255)

  item Item @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])

  @@index([attributeName, attributeValue])
  @@map("product_attributes")
}

model SearchLog {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId       Int?     @map("user_id")
  queryText    String   @map("query_text") @db.VarChar(500)
  resultsCount Int      @map("results_count")
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user User? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([createdAt])
  @@fulltext([queryText])
  @@map("search_logs")
}

model SuggestedTerm {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  term       String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  frequency  Int      @default(0)
  isTrending Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_trending")
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  @@map("suggested_terms")
}

// ─── REPORTS & KPIs ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model KpiDaily {
  id             Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  date           DateTime @unique @db.Date
  dau            Int      @default(0)
  conversionRate Decimal  @default(0) @map("conversion_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  aov            Decimal  @default(0) @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  repurchaseRate Decimal  @default(0) @map("repurchase_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  refundRate     Decimal  @default(0) @map("refund_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)

  @@map("kpi_daily")
}

model ReportReviewEfficiency {
  id                  Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  date                DateTime @unique @db.Date
  avgModerationTimeHrs Decimal @default(0) @map("avg_moderation_time_hrs") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  flaggedCount        Int      @default(0) @map("flagged_count")
  resolvedCount       Int      @default(0) @map("resolved_count")
  appealRate          Decimal  @default(0) @map("appeal_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)

  @@map("report_review_efficiency")
}

model ScheduledReport {
  id            Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  reportType    String   @map("report_type") @db.VarChar(100)
  requestedBy   Int      @map("requested_by")
  scheduledTime DateTime @map("scheduled_time")
  status        String   @default("PENDING") @db.VarChar(50)
  filePath      String?  @map("file_path") @db.VarChar(500)
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  completedAt   DateTime? @map("completed_at")

  requester User @relation(fields: [requestedBy], references: [id])

  @@map("scheduled_reports")
}

// ─── RATE LIMITING ──────────────────────────────────────────────

model RateLimitLog {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId    Int      @map("user_id")
  action    String   @db.VarChar(100)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([userId, action, createdAt])
  @@map("rate_limit_logs")
}
"}
